---
title: "The 2026 baccalaureate, by the numbers"
subtitle: "Sixty-four thousand candidates, one session, few passes. A statistical read of the results."
date: 2026-07-22
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/common.R")
source("R/i18n.R")
source("R/figures.R")
lang <- "en"
g <- index_data()
```

::: {.callout-note}
This page is being translated; the narrative text is not final.
:::

## The distribution of grades

*Text to be translated.*

```{r hero-distribution}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5.2
#| fig-alt: "Distribution of 2026 baccalaureate averages, coloured by decision."
fig_index_hist(g, lang)
```
